steps.title: Statistics – Detection Tour
steps.text: The Detection Statistics page provides five chart views to analyse bird activity patterns over time. This data supports data-driven decisions about deterrence, staffing, and risk management.

steps.title: Filters & Controls
steps.text:
Download icon (top-left): export all data as XLSX.
Calendar icon (top-right): select the date range.
Area selector: if multiple areas are installed, choose which one to analyse.
Species filter: focus the charts on one or more specific species.

steps.title: Time Tab
steps.text: Shows detections broken down by hour, day, week, or month. The top frame shows charts; the bottom frame shows numerical totals with flying/standing breakdown — e.g. 8/3 (11) means 8 flying + 3 standing = 11 total for that species in that period.

steps.title: Sector & Heatmap Tabs
steps.text:
The Sector tab shows a bar chart of detections per sector, helping identify high-activity zones.

The Sector Heatmap tab displays two side-by-side maps: one showing detection count per sector, one showing the average local risk index — both also available as a table below.

steps.title: Year Comparison & Flying Direction
steps.text:
The Year Comparison tab overlays multiple years on one bar chart (colour-coded by year) so you can spot seasonal patterns across seasons.

The Flying Direction tab shows a radial diagram of the direction all detected birds were moving — useful for understanding prevailing flight corridors.

steps.title: Statistics Tour Complete ✓
steps.text: You can now extract meaningful trends from your detection data. Check Statistics → Impact and Statistics → Weather for further analysis tools.
